_comment: Circuit breaker guarding outbound calls to the market-data provider (pf.feed), one instance per process. Not a domain lifecycle: it is the operational envelope for a flaky external. closed = calls flow and failures are counted; open = calls fast-fail without reaching the provider; halfOpen = one trial call decides whether to close again. Cross-call failure count lives in context; a bounded count trips the breaker.

_delays.COOLDOWN: 30000 ms - how long the circuit stays open before probing half-open

_ignores.probeResult: no half-open probe is outstanding while the circuit is closed

_ignores.failure: no calls reach the provider while the circuit is open; they fast-fail as CircuitOpenError
_ignores.success: no calls reach the provider while the circuit is open
_ignores.probeResult: no half-open probe is outstanding while the circuit is open

_ignores.failure: only the single trial probe is evaluated in half-open; other call outcomes are ignored until it resolves
_ignores.success: only the single trial probe is evaluated in half-open
